# AEArrayDataPointer

**Type Alias**

A pointer to a union of type `AEArrayData`.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AEArrayDataPointer = UnsafeMutablePointer<AEArrayData>
```

## Discussion

This data type merely defines a pointer to an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/aearraydata] union.
